cross_scene_arcs.title: Pursuit of Acceptance
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Cholo defends his goal to join Fiddler's Green, confronts Kaufman who denies him, demands money as compensation, and ultimately seeks revenge, dying in the attempt.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Aspiring to buy membership with savings
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: His desire for social acceptance remains unfulfilled

cross_scene_arcs.title: Clash and Pragmatic Alliance with Riley
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Cholo contrasts with Riley's seriousness, defies his authority for personal gain, argues over values, but later includes Riley in his mission despite objections.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Excited about last day, dismissive of Riley
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Allows Riley to join, overriding Foxy

cross_scene_arcs.title: Escalating Confrontation with Kaufman
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Kaufman denies Cholo's membership, leading Cholo to threaten extortion, justify revenge, and directly attack Kaufman, resulting in his death.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Seizure and Leverage of Dead Reckoning
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Cholo takes advantage of chaos to seize Dead Reckoning, uses it to threaten Kaufman for money, and employs it as a base for his revenge plans.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Controlling Dead Reckoning for extortion and revenge
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The effectiveness of the threat is pending

cross_scene_arcs.title: Conflict with Cholo over Values
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Riley's relationship with Cholo evolves from mission tension to brief cooperation during an attack, then to open hostility after a confrontation about profit versus helping people.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Tension during the raid on Riley's last day.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Openly hostile after Riley assaults Cholo in the subway tunnel.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Ideological divide on whether to prioritize profit or people's needs.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Bond and Loss with Mike
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Riley saves Mike from a zombie, revealing mutual incompetence, but later witnesses Mike's suicide after a bite, ending their bond tragically.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Adversarial attitude complicated by revealed poor shooting skills.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Mike is dead, and Riley is devastated.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Emotional impact of Mike's death on Riley.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Protector Role in Crisis
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Riley identifies threats from dead things and later actively protects civilians during a fence breach, running out of ammo as walkers close in.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Observing approaching dead things and their abilities.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Out of ammo with walkers closing in while protecting people.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Survival in a seemingly hopeless situation.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Job Quit to Escape Plan
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Riley quits his job at Fiddler's Green, negotiates with Kaufman to recover Dead Reckoning for resources and passage, and confirms the group's plan to head to Canada.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Employed at Fiddler's Green but decides to quit.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Group set to travel north to Canada with Riley's involvement.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether the escape to Canada will be successful.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Alliance with Riley for Escape
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Slack and Riley build trust through mutual rescue and shared trauma, plan to escape to Canada, and agree to travel north as a group.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Wounded but conscious after saving Riley in the arena.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Part of a group planning to travel to Canada, with Slack approving the inclusion of others.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The success of the escape journey to Canada.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Decisions in Life-Threatening Situations
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Slack makes hard choices to kill bitten companions, first mercy-killing Teahouse and later shooting Manolete to prevent reanimation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Facing the necessity of killing Teahouse after he is bitten by a walker.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Repeating the act with Manolete, solidifying her role in dealing with undead threats.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The emotional toll and ongoing need for such decisions in survival.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Rescue and Liberation Efforts
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Slack takes initiative to guide Brian to safety and then helps free Mulligan and his revolutionaries from jail.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Escaping with Brian towards Fiddler's Green High-Rise.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Successfully liberating prisoners and aligning with revolutionaries.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The next steps and cooperation after the liberation.
